reviews.comment:
El Miércoles 15.01 fui a hacerle el service al auto (cambio de aceite y filtros) no solo me salió más barato que ir a un mecánico, por ser socia del ACA, sino que el servicio y la atención excelente. Gracias Nahuel por tu dedicación y detalle en el trabajo.
Me salvaste que se me rompiera, ahora anda como una bestia!

(Translated by Google)
On Wednesday, January 15th, I took my car in for a service (oil and filter change). Not only was it cheaper than going to a mechanic, because I'm an ACA member, but the service and attention were excellent. Thanks, Nahuel, for your dedication and attention to detail.
You saved me from a breakdown; now it runs like a dream!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfazQ2SGh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mejor precio de combustibles de la zona. Hay que contar con tiempo porque suele haber demoras por la cantidad de autos y pocos surtidores que cuenta la estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Best fuel prices in the area. Allow plenty of time, as there are often delays due to the number of cars and the limited number of pumps at the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfNFAtM0dREAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad no lesda la cara, lees comentarios que te responden demanda por estacionalidad. Dejen de hacer esperar a la gente 40 a 50 minutos a la mañana llegas 6:40 ya no están, sevan todos. te dejan ahí morando los surtidores; Que cada cambio de turno lleva eso, solo en esta empresa pasaría o los que saban le tienen que pasar la indumentaria al que ingresa? Espero que sean más responsable

(Translated by Google)
They're not being honest. You read comments that claim the demand is due to seasonal work. Stop making people wait 40 to 50 minutes. You arrive at 6:40 in the morning and they're all gone. They leave you stranded at the pumps. Does this happen every shift change? Does this only happen at this company, or do the new employees have to pass on their uniforms to the incoming staff? I hope they'll be more responsible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmN2JMcnZRRRAB
